children.heading: Limitations
children.label: a Limitations
children.text: No State, or political subdivision thereof, shall have power to assess, after , any net income tax which was imposed by such State or political subdivision, as the case may be, for any taxable year ending on or before such date, on the income derived within such State by any person from interstate commerce, if the imposition of such tax for a taxable year ending after such date is prohibited by .September 14, 1959section 381 of this title
to invalidate the collection, on or before , of any net income tax imposed for a taxable year ending on or before such date, orSeptember 14, 1959
to prohibit the collection, after , of any net income tax which was assessed on or before such date for a taxable year ending on or before such date.September 14, 1959
